productDisplayName: Timberland Men Earthkeeper Burnsh Medium Brown Shoe
description: These six inch boots from timberland are great for exploring the great outdoors or for traversing the urban terrain. The sturdy design incorporates premium material and wearer friendly features to give you greater comfort and grip. This pair of boots from the Earthkeepers collection is outdoor tested with a small environmental footprint. Team this with jeans and shirts for a great casual look.Upper Premium burnished and oiled leather for durability and water resistance Moisture-wicking lining made from 100% recycled material keeps feet dry and comfortable Padded collar provides comfort and prevents debris from entering 100% recycled PET lace-ups with metallic eyelets for a snug Fit Leather overlays for greater protection from scuffing Tan stitch detailing Brand logo embossed on the side of heel in a slightly weathered look Midsole Leather lined footbed for all day comfort Outsole Classic rubber outsole with aggressive lugs on the heel and forefoot for greater traction hardwearing rubber lugs made with 30% recycled rubber Wash careUse the appropriate timberland leather shoe polish to keep your shoes cleanDo not use polish over canvas/woven areas
